date_from.description: Relative date string for how far back to simulate (e.g. '-24h', '-30d', '-4w'). If not provided, uses the detector's minimum required samples.

diffs_n.description: Order of differencing. 0 = raw values, 1 = first-order diffs (default: 0)

lags_n.description: Number of lag features. 0 = none, >0 = include n lagged values (default: 0)

smooth_n.description: Moving average window size. 0 = no smoothing, >1 = smooth over n points (default: 0)

threshold.description: Anomaly probability threshold [0-1]. Points above this probability are flagged (default: 0.9)

window.description: Rolling window size for calculating mean/std (default: 30)

diffs_n.description: Order of differencing. 0 = raw values, 1 = first-order diffs (default: 0)

lags_n.description: Number of lag features. 0 = none, >0 = include n lagged values (default: 0)

smooth_n.description: Moving average window size. 0 = no smoothing, >1 = smooth over n points (default: 0)

threshold.description: Anomaly probability threshold [0-1]. Points above this probability are flagged (default: 0.9)

window.description: Rolling window size for calculating median/MAD (default: 30)

multiplier.description: IQR multiplier for fence calculation (default: 1.5, use 3.0 for far outliers)

diffs_n.description: Order of differencing. 0 = raw values, 1 = first-order diffs (default: 0)

lags_n.description: Number of lag features. 0 = none, >0 = include n lagged values (default: 0)

smooth_n.description: Moving average window size. 0 = no smoothing, >1 = smooth over n points (default: 0)

window.description: Rolling window size for calculating quartiles (default: 30)

lower_bound.description: Lower bound - values below this are anomalies

upper_bound.description: Upper bound - values above this are anomalies
